topic: Mobbin MCP developer surface for an mcp-tooling transport mode (mobbin-mcp-server tool surface, auth/API key, transport, install; mobbin/skills design-research workflows; free vs Pro plan gating; transport-packet and .utcp_config.json manual requirements)

focus: Broad survey of mobbin-mcp-server + mobbin/skills repos
noveltyJustification: First broad pass; transport model (remote Streamable HTTP), repo thinness, single mobbin-search skill, image-inline results, and install path are all new to this packet.

ruledOut.approach: Read the auth/plan-gating/tool-list from the server repo README
ruledOut.reason: READMEs omit auth, plan gating, and explicit tool names; canonical source is docs.mobbin.com/mcp + server.json

graphEvents.label: Transport = remote Streamable HTTP at api.mobbin.com/mcp (no local process)
mobbin/skills defines one design-research skill: mobbin-search

convergenceSignals.note: 1 evidence iteration; rolling/MAD unavailable; stopPolicy=max-iterations so convergence is telemetry only

focus: Auth/plan-gating + exact tool surface (server.json, mcp.json, docs endpoint, mobbin-search SKILL.md)
noveltyJustification: Two-server disambiguation, exact search_screens tool + I/O, and url-only/no-key auth are net-new and load-bearing; gating UNKNOWN and packet/manual shape are fresh derivations; minor refinement of iter-1 transport conclusion.

ruledOut.approach: Treat docs.mobbin.com/mcp (Mobbin Docs Mintlify MCP) as the design-reference server
ruledOut.reason: It is a separate docs-search server; design refs live at api.mobbin.com/mcp

graphEvents.label: Two distinct Mobbin MCPs: api.mobbin.com/mcp (design) vs docs.mobbin.com/mcp (Mintlify docs)
Design MCP tool = search_screens (query/platform/limit) returns inline image blocks
All documented client configs are url-only; no static API key

convergenceSignals.note: 2 evidence iterations; rolling=mean([1.0,0.85])=0.925 >> 0.05 so convergence would vote CONTINUE anyway; MAD needs 4; stopPolicy=max-iterations so STOP is driven by iteration cap, not convergence
